summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Referral Program feature for Pro tier. All backend APIs pass (10/10 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with referral code input, validation, discount display, and Pro user referral code management.
passed_tests: GET /api/pricing returns referral discount info ($5 discount, discounted_price: $24.99)
GET /api/referral/validate/{code} returns valid=false for invalid codes
GET /api/referral/validate/{code} returns valid=true with discount for valid Pro user codes
Referral code validation is case insensitive
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session applies discount ($24.99) when valid referral code provided
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session uses full price ($29.99) without referral code
POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session uses full price with invalid referral code
Pro users see their referral code in /api/auth/me response
Pro users see their referral code in /api/user/limits response
Free users have null referral_code
Upgrade page shows referral code input field for free users
Applying valid referral code shows '$5 discount from [referrer name]!' message
Price updates from $29.99 to $24.99 with strikethrough on original price
Upgrade button text changes to 'Upgrade to Pro - Save $5!'
Pro users see 'You're a Pro Member!' page on /upgrade
Pro users see 'Share & Earn' section with their referral code
Pro users can copy their referral code from upgrade page
Pro users see referral code in user dropdown menu
Pro users can copy referral code from dropdown menu
Pro users see 'Friends referred' counter
seed_data_creation: Created Pro test user with referral code: user_id=test-pro-user-1770922222961, session_token=test_session_pro_1770922222961, referral_code=CINEMA-TEST01
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral program fully tested. Two test users available: (1) Free user: session_token=test_session_persistent_1770921307628, (2) Pro user: session_token=test_session_pro_1770922222961 with referral_code=CINEMA-TEST01. All referral endpoints working correctly.

referral_validation.valid_code_handling: Returns valid=true with discount info and referrer name

pro_user_referral_display.upgrade_page: Shows Share & Earn section with code
pro_user_referral_display.user_dropdown: Shows referral code with copy button

frontend_ui.copy_button: Working (clipboard access may be restricted in automated tests)
